achievements.title: You Have Been Chosen
achievements.description: The four young adventures have received the blessing of the Wind Crystal. Go forth and meet their destiny!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Painkiller
achievements.description: The Warriors of Light have aided an old man with a timely tincture and have been rewarded for their kindness.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Monster-in-a-Box!
achievements.description: Our heroes have wrested the Wight Slayer from a beast lurking within a treasure box!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: We Fear Change
achievements.description: Four onion kids have braved the Cave of the Seal and journeyed to its end without using any of the vocational blessings given by the Wind Crystal.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Filling in the Blanks
achievements.description: Through deft bladework and and mystical might the Warriors of Light have lifted the Jinn's curse!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: The Best Medicine
achievements.description: Cid's granny is feeling much better after our heroes cured what ailed her.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Diminishing Returns
achievements.description: After their leap of faith, the Warriors of Light are gifted the spell of miniaturization.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: The Doctor's Doctor
achievements.description: A hidden road is revealed to our heroes thanks to their penchant for medicating miniature menders.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Why Are You Even Here?!
achievements.description: Four foolish heroes have ventured into the Nepto Shrine and escaped with its treasure, led the entire time by a brave warrior who eschews magic.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Pest Control
achievements.description: The Warriors of Light have calmed Nepto's madness!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Breadwinner
achievements.description: For circling the world on a chocobo, our heroes have been given the gift of baked goods.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Meet the Gurgans
achievements.description: The Warriors of Light have received a toadally useful gift from a mysterious race of prophets.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Jump in the Fire
achievements.description: Four heroes contemplate mortality after saving their world from plummeting to its doom.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Protégé of Perseus
achievements.description: The malicious Medusa has been slain by the Warriors of Light, with a single Fighter (aka Warrior) doing all of the damage!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: The Grass Is Greener Here
achievements.description: Standing amidst bleating sheep, the Warriors of Light take in their first sight of the country town of Gisahl.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: You're Gonna Carry That Weight
achievements.description: Behold! A beast that stores your baubles in its belly!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Chill Out
achievements.description: And lo, the Warriors of Light froze the cunning Guzco, finishing him off with ice-elemental black magic!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Stone-Cold Robbed
achievements.description: Beaming with joy, the four heroes successfully return the dwarfs' horn... or do they?
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Pyro Punching Power
achievements.description: The scorching fires of the Salamander have been extinguished by our heroes without any mages in the party!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: I Dub Thee Sir Hotpants
achievements.description: The power of the Fire Crystal has ignited new potential within the Warriors of Light!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Illiterate Warriors
achievements.description: Who needs books? The Warriors of Light have navigated the flying elder tree and defeated the nefarious Hyne without taking on the role of a scholar.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: The Root of the Problem
achievements.description: The eldest tree has returned to the living forest. The forest spirits are content.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Is This Safe to Drink...?
achievements.description: A reclusive chemist has generously donated two terrific tinctures to the party in exchange for saving the kingdom.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: It's a Square World After All
achievements.description: The Warriors of Light have ventured out to the surface world to see what trouble awaits them beyond the lands of their birth.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: The Password Is Not Swordfish
achievements.description: The water cave's barrier has been unsealed!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Seafood Soup
achievements.description: The Warriors of Light, utilizing all four vocations granted by the Fire Crystal, have defeated the Kraken!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Wave of Success
achievements.description: Awash with the power of the Water Crystal, the Warriors of Light are showered with new power as the world emerges...
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Respect Your Elders
achievements.description: Help from a strange source has allowed the Warriors of Light to acquire floating shoes.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: The Honest Approach
achievements.description: Traversing the entirety of Goldor's Mansion with nary a thief among them, the Warriors of Light have successfully unchained their impounded aircraft.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Robin Hood and His Merry Men
achievements.description: A motley band of hunters, bards, and thieves has knocked Goldor down!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: The Midas Touch
achievements.description: At last, the Enterprise's chains are broken!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Welcome to Summoning 101
achievements.description: The four heroes have located the summoners' town.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: The Musical Kingdom
achievements.description: Seeking songs of wisdom, the four heroes set foot in the town of bards.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: We're Gonna Have to Jump
achievements.description: The four heroes, understanding foreshadowing, have emptied the Dragon Tower of its holdings.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Or Maybe We Won't
achievements.description: Our heroes have laid waste to the blusterous Garuda without the aid of any dragoons!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Ludicrous Speed
achievements.description: With the construction of the Nautilus, the Warriors of Light look ahead to a future of speedy travel.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Kupo... I Mean, Uh... Nyaah!
achievements.description: Our heroes encounter a brand new race of creatures: Moogles!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: You're Going to Be Submerged
achievements.description: Our intrepid heroes have gained the ability to travel beneath the waves and explore the shadowed depths of the ocean.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: In Case You Missed Anything
achievements.description: Thanks to their undersea mobility, the Warriors of Light discovered a village of magic to lighten the weight of their purses.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Rocking Out
achievements.description: The beautiful music of Noah's Lute is now in the hands of the Warriors of Light.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Sunken Treasure
achievements.description: Even though they were hidden in the depths of a cave hidden in the depths of the sea, the heroes of light have looted all four secret chests in the Undersea Cave.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: The Flying Fortress
achievements.description: The Warriors of Light have acquired their very own flying fortress.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: The Power of the Dark Side
achievements.description: And so, the Warriors of Light plundered the town of Falgabaad, leaving no treasures behind.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Divided They Fall
achievements.description: Behold! The Warriors of Light have conquered the Cave of Darkness without a Magic Knight in their party!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: The Weight of Water
achievements.description: The Warriors of Light, utilizing four different vocations granted by the Water Crystal, have defeated Hekaton!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Into the Depths of Despair
achievements.description: The Earth Fang is now in the possession of the Warriors of Light!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Teaching the Masters
achievements.description: Dorga and Unne have been bested by the Warriors of Light using the vocations of Shaman, Warlock, and Summoner - with one Warrior of Light in the same vocation as another!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: With Friends Like These...
achievements.description: The Warriors of Light have claimed the Sylx and Eureka keys.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: The Allfather
achievements.description: Our heroes have proven themselves worthy of summoning Odin.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: The Sea Serpent
achievements.description: Leviathan, mighty beast of the seas, has fallen in battle and granted our heroes his power!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Oops, Forgot My Sunscreen
achievements.description: The Warriors of Light bested Bahamut without putting up any reflective barrier!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: The King of Dragons
achievements.description: After a perilous fight, the Warriors of Light have bested Bahamut and claimed his power as their own!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Blast Apart the Earth
achievements.description: Using only the powers of their magical vocations, the Warriors of Light have toppled Titan!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Master of Magic
achievements.description: Within the embrace of the Earth Crystal, the Warriors of Light receive its blessings!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Beyond the Walls
achievements.description: Destiny awaits our four heroes, who have unlocked the way forward in the Sylx Tower!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: I Am Protected
achievements.description: The Warriors of Light have claimed the hidden Ribbon from the Forbidden Land Eureka.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Keep Away from Werewolves
achievements.description: The Full Moon is now in the possession of the Warriors of Light!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: A True Samurai
achievements.description: Our heroes have proven worthy to wield the legendary katana, Masamune!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: The Holy Sword
achievements.description: Might and wisdom have granted the holy sword Excalibur to our heroes!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Post-Apocalyptic
achievements.description: The Warriors of Light have wrested the mighty Ragnarok from the depths of the Forbidden Land Eureka!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Employees of the Month
achievements.description: Through trial of combat, the ultimate vocations of Ninja and Sage are granted to the Warriors of Light. ...oh, and a staff, too.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Need Some Ammo?
achievements.description: A secret shop is revealed in the Forbidden Land Eureka!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: The Gauntlet
achievements.description: From the entrance of the Sylx Tower, the Warriors of Light have climbed to meet their destiny and have defeated the Cloud of Darkness, all without using the vocations of Ninja, Sage, or Onion Kid.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Walk in the Shadows
achievements.description: Their foe lies defeated, but darkness awaits as the Warriors of Light have found themselves in the Dark World!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Dark World Tour
achievements.description: The Warriors of Light have forged a friendship with all four Warriors of Darkness.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Attack of the Clones
achievements.description: The four ribbons of protection have all been claimed from the Dark World's four branches.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Bringer of Hope
achievements.description: The Warriors of Light have restored balance to the worlds by defeating the Cloud of Darkness!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Culture for the Countryside
achievements.description: And so the Four Warriors of Light did play some Beethoven for the farmers, with decidedly poor reviews.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Pianoman
achievements.description: With their admirable piano skills, a talented Warrior of Light has inspired the people to dance!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Supreme Warlock
achievements.description: None shall stand before this Warrior of Light who has learned every black magic spell!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Supreme Shaman
achievements.description: None shall fall before this Warrior of Light who has learned every white magic spell!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Supreme Summoner
achievements.description: The beasts of the land are under the sway of this Warrior of Light who has learned every summon spell!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Dragon Hunter
achievements.description: On their ascent toward destiny, our heroes have found and slain a beastly Green Dragon!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Dragon Slayer
achievements.description: On their ascent toward destiny, our heroes have found and slain a mighty Yellow Dragon!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Dragon Dominator
achievements.description: On their ascent toward destiny, our heroes have found and slain a terrifying Red Dragon!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: The Irresistible Force
achievements.description: The Onion Sword has been acquired from the fangs of a slain dragon!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: The Immovable Object
achievements.description: The Onion Shield has been acquired from the fangs of a slain dragon!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: The Hardest Head
achievements.description: The Onion Helm has been acquired from the fangs of a slain dragon!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: The Sturdiest Body
achievements.description: The Onion Armor has been acquired from the fangs of a slain dragon!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: The Strongest Hands
achievements.description: The Onion Gauntlet has been acquired from the fangs of a slain dragon!
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Homeland Haul
achievements.description: And so, the four Warriors of Light acquired all of the treasures from the northwestern portion of their homeland, from Ur and the Kingdom of Sasoon to Canaan and its mighty mountain.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Interior Acquisition
achievements.description: After their plummet from the summit, the Four Warriors of Light acquired every treasure from the nearby tiny town and all of the areas accessible from the inner sea of their world.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Peripheral Pilfering
achievements.description: With passage clear to the outer seas, the Warriors of Light amassed a collection of loot from the outer areas of their floating world and a mysterious flying tree...
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Floodborne Finds
achievements.description: Ahoy! The Four Warriors of Light discovered the surface world and collected what could be found in flooded lands and those reachable on foot after they floodwaters receded.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: From the Rich and Poor Alike
achievements.description: The Four Warriors of Light have stripped Salonia clean of treasures, along with the villages of Leprit and Dastar.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Nautical Necessities
achievements.description: Upon acquiring a swift new craft, the Warriors of Light proceeded to collect treasures from the seas and the depths below.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Invicible Itemising
achievements.description: Our four heroes gathered all that could be found in the ancient ruins, then used their new-found fortress to help collect everything remaining on this side of the four barrier statues.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Mighty Terrors, Mighty Treasure
achievements.description: The Warriors of Light braved the lairs of two ancient summonable beasts and obtained the riches found within.
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: Forbidden Pleasures
achievements.description: The Warriors of Light set out into the Ancients' Labyrinth and collected its wonders as well as all of those in the areas beyond...
achievements.author: TheMysticalOne

achievements.title: No Stone Unturned
achievements.description: Loot every single chest and hidden item in the game.
achievements.author: LordKuddy
